name: Calico
short_description: Leap, climb, and explore as a nimble cat in a tough yet charming platformer. With tight controls, handcrafted pixel art levels, and simple mechanics, this game offers a pure platforming challenge across 60+ colorful stages — no fluff, just gameplay and discovery.
detailed_description:
Play as a nimble cat leaping through adorable color-themed levels. This is a game about jumping, climbing, and discovering — all from the paws of a small, agile cat. With tight controls, handcrafted levels, and an honest love for platformers, this game keeps things simple at heart while letting the world grow around you as it challenges your reflexes and curiosity as you traverse over 60 levels.

A Straightforward Platformer at Its Core

  • Designed for fans of classic platformers — responsive controls, thoughtful level layouts, and no fluff.

  • less dialogue, no cutscenes — just gameplay, discovery, and flow.

  • Each level teaches through play. You learn by doing, failing, and trying again.

Cute Pixel-Artsy World

The visuals stay humble — clean pixel art with a soft touch. Every block is placed with care, keeping things clear without overcomplicating the screen.

  • Backgrounds use gentle parallax and color to give depth without distraction.

  • Realms are themed but not flashy: sky steel, glowing libraries, earthy caves.

  • It’s cozy, readable, and easy on the eyes — like the platformers you grew up with, but touched by something slightly dreamlike.

Simple Mechanics, Precise Controls

Don’t be fooled by the soft visuals or chill vibe — this game gets tough.

  • Tight jumps, tricky timing, and machanic-based puzzles will push your reflexes and your patience.

  • Mistakes are frequent, but restarts are instant. It’s all about repetition and improvement.
